programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in Edinburgh, retail manager Marc hopes to impress his guests with a bug-based menu. But before long the tension between Angie and Abby takes centre stage again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. To make matters worse, Marge and the rest of the congregation are short of funds to repair their beloved place of worship - so they resort to gambling to raise the necessary funds

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Ian Murray MP sets out the Labour Party's view on how to improve conditions for people who work in social care

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Natalie and Pete come up with some compact camping ideas, such as a portable solar shower that doubles up as a sink and tyre chairs with a rustic rope finish. Dick also helps a viewer transform her garden into a plot she can be proud of, and Angel offers upholstery advice to a woman whose favourite chair has been left in tatters by the family dog

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: With more than 700 children currently serving prison sentences across England and Wales, the documentary asks why Britain struggles to stop young offenders being sucked into a life of crime. DS Will Whale and his team at Southampton CID investigate 25 burglaries from elderly people's homes, crimes they suspect are connected to a group of teenagers. In Winchester Prison, a young inmate is sent to the segregation unit after climbing onto the roof, while in Hampshire, a probation officer is doing everything she can to keep a prolific offender on the straight and narrow

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Daisy May Cooper take on guest team captain Richard Ayoade and Ivo Graham. Adam Buxton is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, and Joe Wilkinson joins Rachel Riley at the numbers board

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Greenville, Mississippi, to save fine dining establishment Sherman's Restaurant, which has been a presence in the town for 30 years. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to revamp the premises, clean and renovate the kitchen and introduce a new menu featuring update versions of the restaurant's staple dishes, working around the clock to teach the staff how to prepare them

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: The Icgoren family take on the Legends as a strong mother of five, who runs her house like a boot camp, swaps lives with a farmer's wife, who lets her children run rampant

programme.title: Inside Missguided: Made in Manchester
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at one of Britain's biggest online fashion retailer's offices to explore what life is like for their young, female-dominated workforce at their offices in the heart of Manchester. Missguided owner Nitin wants the brand to hit the tabloids, and plans to gatecrash London Fashion Week with an eye-catching stunt with the reality star Gemma Collins. Meanwhile, the creative team cast for a risqué film shoot for their annual Female Empowerment campaign for women of all shapes and sizes, and the designers and buyers head to sun-kissed Ibiza to spy on the latest fashion trends

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. South African born Nigel and his Welsh wife Nikki kick off the competition with dishes from Nigel's homeland, while Darren and Simon attempt to woo their guests with a flavour of their first-class lifestyle on day two, before down-to-earth Neil and Carly offer up a taste of their favourite dishes on the final night

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect showcases innovative designs that demonstrate that big things can be achieved on small budgets - from a shed transformed into a Tardis to a home in Herefordshire built without any budget at all. In Texas, George visits a family home made out of 'earth bags' as well as one of the smallest homes ever seen on the show

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Rob Bell heads to Norfolk to follow a lost railway through some of the quietest - yet wealthiest - parts of the country. This railway was a curious latecomer when it was built in the 1880s and it threatened to rudely thrust the region into the industrial age. Rob explores an entire engineering town built from scratch, learns how Norfolk's agriculture was super-charged, and sees for himself where thousands of holidaying Midlanders arrived to sail the Norfolk Broads. The line put Norfolk on the frontline of the war so Rob takes to the skies to spot dozens of hastily constructed airfields

programme.desc: A young couple cope with the mysterious illness of their newborn baby only to discover the child they brought home is not theirs. Drama, starring Amanda Clayton and Brandon Barash

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Heartbroken Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel, Monica faces a difficult decision over a career opportunity and Chandler is surprised by Joey's strange choice of gift

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey proves a hit with his co-star, despite what the critics think. Rachel dates a stranger who seems outwardly charming - until he starts screaming at people. Unfortunately, only Ross witnesses his bizarre behaviour and nobody else believes him. Guest starring Ben Stiller

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent storms off and Emmett is devastated, Aaron and David are in for a rude awakening, and Jane takes on more than she bargained for helping Susan out at school

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tane's lack of experience comes to the fore in his job interview, John and Marilyn finally settle on bold candidate Amber, and John lets her go far too quickly

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels 1,500 miles in a journey from Cape Town in South Africa to the Victoria Falls in Zimbabwe, following a hugely ambitious railway pioneered by 19th-century British colonial politician Cecil Rhodes. He starts his trip in luxury on the Blue Train, a five-star hotel on rails that takes him to the mining town of Kimberley, where he explores the diamond mine where Rhodes made his fortune

programme.title: The Secret World of Your Rubbish
programme.desc: The work of the rocket scientists at the University of Surrey Space Centre, who are researching how to remove the hundreds of thousands of space junk orbiting the Earth's atmosphere at 17,000mph, which could do catastrophic damage if they were to collide with a satellite. Also, a specialist waste disposal team tackles asbestos which, despite being banned more than 20 years ago, remains the leading cause of occupational death in the UK, and glass thrown into a bottle bank is recycled as a jam jar

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary following people with a compulsion to hoard. Cleaners Caz and Tee help Great Yarmouth woman Esther, who is under threat of eviction if she does not clear out her home. But they have only three days to do it. Emotional trauma is at the root of Nigel's problem and he receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice, who makes him see the situation is totally out of control

programme.title: The Teacher with Tourette's
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Natalie, a teacher with a difference - her Tourette's means lessons may be interrupted by uncontrollable swearing and the sort of comments one would never expect to hear in a classroom. The condition was triggered by a traumatic event in her past and while it colours every aspect of her life, she is determined to prove it is no barrier to succeeding at her job. But as she wrestles with new challenges, not to mention the constant stigma and judgement of others, can she overcome the obstacles the faces on a daily basis?

programme.title: We Love Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: A celebration of Ruth Jones and James Corden's comedy, with stars including Alison Steadman, Larry Lamb and Melanie Walters revealing backstage gossip. Location manager Nicky James lets viewers in on filming secrets, including how they managed to pull off that cliff-hanger finale, despite hundreds of fans turning up to watch, while favourite scenes are recounted as fans of the show including Ruth Langsford and Tamzin Outhwaite talk about why they love the sitcom

programme.title: Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse inside the confectionery world, visiting factories, chocolatiers and shops, and even revealing the Queen's favourite chocolates

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: This edition focuses on North Yorkshire Police targeting crossborder criminals, with a fifth of theft and drug dealing committed by crooks from outside the area. Sergeant Paul is on high alert after a stolen car linked to a recent suspected firearms incident is spotted on his patch, while in Scarborough PC Dan is on the hunt for criminals in a 4x4 who have allegedly been stealing vans - and it is not long before he becomes embroiled in an off-road pursuit.

programme.title: Never Teach Your Wife to Drive
programme.desc: Three men set out to teach their partners the rules of the road, while state-of-the-art in-car cameras record events including blazing arguments and near misses, and the drama and mayhem of the lessons puts added strain on their relationships. At 32, Kat Fleming-Scott is a late starter at driving, but her husband Chris's map-reading leaves a lot to be desired when he gets them hopelessly lost in Liverpool, while Weymouth mother-of-four Lauren Foster has lessons from her spouse Adam, who believes men are much the better drivers. Meanwhile, Nathan Phillips is a worrier and when partner Laura Whitfield becomes overconfident behind the wheel, he begins to show signs of regretting his decision to teach her

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Scientists
programme.desc: Allan Chapman profiles Greek philosopher Aristotle, whose writings defined the future course of scientific inquiry by framing the natural world as a unified whole governed by certain laws

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton visit Scraptoft in Leicester, where a five-bedroom house valued at £229,500 needs a makeover to enhance its appeal. The kitchen is transformed into the hub of family life and a lounge is converted into a dining room, while unfortunate colour clashes are toned down

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery

programme.title: Belle (2013)
programme.desc: The illegitimate mixed-race daughter of a Royal Navy admiral is raised in the household of her great uncle, but is never entirely accepted in Georgian British society. She falls in love with an idealistic lawyer, and together they campaign against the slave trade. Fact-based period drama, starring Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Tom Wilkinson and Emily Watson

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: Disturbia (2007)
programme.desc: A troubled teenager is sentenced to three months under house arrest for attacking a teacher, and passes the time by spying on his neighbours. However, one day he notices something suspicious and becomes convinced one of them is a serial killer. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Carrie-Anne Moss, David Morse and Sarah Roemer

programme.title: We Are the Best! (2014)
programme.desc: Two rebellious teenage girls growing up in 1980s Stockholm discover punk rock, and are inspired to start their own band, despite the mockery of their classmates. They find an unexpected kindred spirit in a born-again Christian girl, who has the musical talent they need. Drama based on Coco Moodysson's graphic novel, starring Mira Barkhammar, Mira Grosin and Liv LeMoyne. In Swedish

programme.title: The Indian in the Cupboard (1995)
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is given an old cupboard and a toy Iroquois Indian for his birthday - but when he puts the figure inside the cupboard, he is astonished to see it come to life. He repeats the experiment with more of his toys, and realises he is creating real people - and is responsible for their wellbeing. Children's fantasy, with Hal Scardino, Litefoot and Steve Coogan

programme.title: The Boxtrolls (2014)
programme.desc: The people of a small town live in fear of underground trolls, who they do not realise are actually harmless. A boy raised by the creatures must convince the townsfolk there is nothing to fear when a team of pest exterminators is hired to wipe out the friendly monsters. Stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Isaac Hempstead Wright, Elle Fanning and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: The Rewrite (2014)
programme.desc: A washed-up Hollywood screenwriter takes a job at a small university, planning to exploit his position as a local celebrity and do as little work as possible. His cynical outlook begins to change when he falls for a single mother working toward her degree, while a talented pupil makes him consider what he wants from his life. Romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Marisa Tomei, Allison Janney and JK Simmons

programme.title: Everest (2015)
programme.desc: Two expeditions set out to climb to the summit of the world's highest mountain. Both parties of mountaineers get caught in one of the fiercest snowstorms ever recorded, and face a desperate struggle to survive against the elements. Fact-based adventure, starring Jason Clarke, Josh Brolin, Jake Gyllenhaal and Keira Knightley

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job (2017)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of career criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. True-life crime drama, with Stephen Moyer, Larry Lamb and Matthew Goode

programme.title: Sexy Beast (2000)
programme.desc: A retired safe-breaker enjoying the high life in Spain becomes the target of unwanted attention when his psychotic former gangland boss comes looking to enlist his help and expertise for a major bank robbery in London. Crime thriller, starring Ray Winstone, Ben Kingsley, Ian McShane and Amanda Redman

programme.title: As Above, So Below (2014)
programme.desc: An expedition ventures into a network of underground tunnels beneath Paris. As they explore the catacombs, the archaeologists experience a series of strange events and come under attack from a mysterious unknown force that seems to know their darkest secrets. Horror, starring Perdita Weeks and Ben Feldman

programme.title: Menashe (2017)
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of New York's notoriously secretive Hasidic Jewish community, grocery store clerk Menashe struggles against tradition to keep custody of his only son after his wife passes away. Drama, starring Menashe Lustig. In Yiddish

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Ride Along 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Excitable beat cop Ben longs to work alongside his fiancee's brother, hard-boiled detective James, who does not think he has what it takes. James decides to show Ben that he is not cut out for the job by recruiting him to help bring a drug dealer to justice. Comedy sequel, starring Ice Cube, Kevin Hart and Olivia Munn

programme.title: The Bank Job (2008)
programme.desc: A London car dealer is persuaded by an old flame to rob a bank. The heist goes off without a hitch, leaving the crooks in possession of cash and jewels worth millions - as well as a safety deposit box containing top-secret information the government and security services are determined to keep buried. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Jason Statham and Saffron Burrows

programme.title: Hounds of Love (2017)
programme.desc: When a young woman is abducted by a couple from a suburb of Perth, Australia, her only chance of surviving the terrible ordeal her kidnappers inflict upon her is to drive a wedge between them. Crime thriller, starring Emma Booth, Ashleigh Cummings and Stephen Curry

programme.title: Stand Up Guys (2012)
programme.desc: An ageing gangster is released from prison after 28 years, and is reunited with his two partners in crime. They set out to recapture their glory days with one last burst of criminal activity, but one of the trio is under pressure from a Mob boss and has a dangerous secret that threatens them all. Crime comedy, starring Al Pacino, Christopher Walken and Alan Arkin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, chatty couple Kealey and Nathan begin with an international-themed menu. However, when well-to-do Graham and wife Sarah discover they're doing exactly the same dessert, the cheesecake war is on. Later, the youngsters of the group, Alex and Emily, offer up some European culinary delights

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The show's first millionaire presents the experts with their biggest ever challenge. Another couple have an instant connection, but the bride's twin sister is not convinced

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe loses his swagger in the bedroom when he learns the significance of the little devil tattoo that was inked on Mel's bottom years before. Lennox and Zander are forced to work with an untrained actress when they make their short film, but their efforts to tutor her in the role cause conflict between them

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake leads a manhunt after an assassination attempt on a city councillor, while Holt adjusts to his new position as a uniformed officer

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A new captain at the Nine-Nine attempts to ingratiate herself with Jake and the squad by inviting them over to her house for a dinner party

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The Coopers help a broken-hearted Pastor Jeff through a rough patch in his marriage. Sheldon pressures church members for donations when Mary takes him to work for a day

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius invites the entire school to a party for the Nobel Prize announcements. Meemaw learns more about Dr Sturgis's past and Georgie's desire for cable TV leads to a stand-off between him and George Sr

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel launches a healthy diet campaign while running for a Senate seat, but a voter soon catches her out eating some unhealthy fast food. When the man tweets a photo of her gorging on a burger and calls her a hypocrite, she gets into a war of words with him

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel receives unexpected news that could have a direct impact on her attempt to run for a senate seat. Ryder receives his orders from the US Navy, and a car crash gives Lenin and Zander a new outlook on life. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Dana and Adam are given a doll to parent for a class assignment, but find their project compromised when Beverly interferes. Erica tries to get her own back on Barry when he takes up all her best friend Lainey's time

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray takes Adam to a Phillies baseball game and allows him to leave his seat on his own for the first time, only to find Adam immediately gets lost in the stadium. Beverly accompanies Erica and Barry on a shopping trip - but they begin arguing on the way home

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt asks for Jake's help in a case that is exceptionally meaningful to him. Charles and Terry work together on a side business

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The entire squad is on high alert when a massive blackout hits Brooklyn. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg as a detective with a light-hearted approach to crime

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon is not invited to Billy's birthday party, while George Sr has male-bonding time with Dr Sturgis

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to fake an illness to avoid a swimming test at school. Meanwhile, Dr Sturgis attempts to spy on Meemaw's new boyfriend. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys have fun at the expense of Penny's boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Year's costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Imran Adams and Ross Adams look back at a classic storyline from 2011. Silas enjoys watching his plan come together as the police descend on Hollyoaks village

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Final couple Blair and Sean try to get over their cheating exes, before following the other four couples on the next stage of the challenge - the honeymoon

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the battle with Adam, Buffy, Willow, Xander and Giles experience the same vivid and disturbing dream which reveals their fears and doubts and offers hints of what the future may hold. They all find themselves hunted through the dream by a mysterious primitive warrior intent on killing them in real life - as well as confronting the eternal, unknowable mystery of the cheese guy

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: The legendary Count Dracula comes to Sunnydale in search of Buffy, whom he intends to seduce into becoming a vampire and embracing the dark nature of her abilities. Xander falls under the mental control of the hypnotic count, while Riley feels threatened by the power Dracula has over Buffy. Giles feels Buffy no longer needs him and confides in Willow that he is planning to return to England

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang's preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howard's mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, turning their attention to shows including Britain's Got Talent, The Shallows, Antiques Roadshow, Line of Duty, Miriam's Dead Good Adventure and University Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in April 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Helicopter pilot Paul, 59, is embarking on his first-ever date dressed in women's clothing and hopes that 51-year-old Sydney can see that underneath he is 'just a normal bloke', while make-up artist and mother-of-five Bianca, 31, sits down for a meal with white van man and fellow single parent Daniel

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, chatty couple Kealey and Nathan begin with an international-themed menu. However, when well-to-do Graham and wife Sarah discover they're doing exactly the same dessert, the cheesecake war is on. Later, the youngsters of the group, Alex and Emily, offer up some European culinary delights

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she claims her mother's obsession is 'sad'. However, when she wins the bet, Erica opts out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly has to find a way to win her daughter back to the celebrations. Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, Phil and Kate get the contest started with a menu inspired by their most romantic meals. Day two sees loved-up bus drivers Lee and Dawn cooking up favourite dishes from their wedding day, before plant biologist Katie and micro-brewer Ed try to impress with a Spanish-inspired menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back groom Courtney plans to throw a wedding for his controlling bride-to-be Lauren at the caravan park she goes to every year

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Final couple Blair and Sean try to get over their cheating exes, before following the other four couples on the next stage of the challenge - the honeymoon

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe gets a new job as the lifestyle correspondent on a local morning TV show, but is required to get up very early every day, which puts a strain on his relationship with Mel. Lennox and Zander have creative differences as they continue to shoot their short film. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Adrian Pimento shows up unexpectedly to seek Jake and Charles' help after claiming someone is trying to kill him. The rest of the squad endures a Workplace Conflict seminar

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Competitive juices are flowing as Jake and the squad compete in the second Jimmy Jab Games - a series of eccentric races and contests held in the precinct building

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: With Dr Sturgis still in a psychiatric hospital, Mary worries about Sheldon's mental health and whether a similar outcome is in his future. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to earn money by selling Texas snow globes. Iain Armitage and Zoe Penny star

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The prodigy must find a new way to stay academically challenged without the university class run by Dr Sturgis. Pastor Jeff asks Mary to be his conscience when it comes to him starting up a new relationship. George calls Mary, while she is busy helping Pastor Jeff pick out clothes for a date

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel wants to break up with her boyfriend Donald, but she feels guilty because he has just been fired from his job - so she asks Joe to help boost Donald's confidence before she dumps him. Meanwhile, Holly confides a secret to Lennox, and asks her to keep it from Ryder

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox's boyfriend begins to feel neglected when she spends time on her new blog instead of with him. Meanwhile, Joe sets Mel up on a blind date, and in exchange he wants to take out her attractive friend Ariel. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica decides to put college on hold and pursue her dream of becoming a pop singer - which causes her parents no end of stress. Meanwhile, an April Fools' Day prank leads to an all-out war between Adam and Barry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Jeff Garlin and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has a birthday sleepover, during which his friend Garry shares out some of his father's home-brewed beer and makes everyone sick. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica want a new CD player, but Murray tells them he will only buy one for them if they write the greatest song ever

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is assigned to a minor graffiti case by Captain Holt as punishment for turning up late for work, but the investigation becomes a major headache when the vandal's identity is revealed. Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff's wedding. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of his household chores, while Sheldon learns to listen when an emotional Paige struggles with her parents' divorce

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Imran Adams and Ross Adams look back at a classic storyline from 2011. Cheryl confronts Nancy about her incriminating newspaper article

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples wrap up their honeymoons and head back to Sydney for the very first dinner party where they will meet each other for the first time

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of well-known faces including Denise Van Outen, Nick Grimshaw, Joe Swash, Stacey Solomon, Mo Gilligan, Nicola Adams and Zoe Ball appraise Little Fires Everywhere, The Titan Games, Casino Royale, World Cup Final '66: England v West Germany, Naked Attraction and Bradley Walsh & Son: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during March 2020, turning their attention to shows including Dragons' Den, Crufts and Antiques Roadshow. ITV drama Liar, Netflix's The Stranger and Channel 4's new dating show Five Guys a Week come under scrutiny, while news coverage of Harry and Meghan and the coronavirus are also appraised

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy suddenly and inexplicably has a younger sister named Dawn - and everyone mysteriously acts as if she has been there all along. Frustrated at being in the shadow of her heroic sibling, Dawn gets drawn into Buffy's dangerous world when she is kidnapped by Harmony, who is determined to establish herself as the slayer's new arch-enemy

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: A demon's magical wiles backfire and create a magical double of Xander, which proves so proves so charming and plausible that it fools everyone and takes over every aspect of life - leaving him struggling to convince Buffy and the others of his true identity

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the seventh series finale, Sheldon becomes upset about his career, the destruction of the comic-book store and Leonard and Penny's future living arrangements. Elsewhere, Howard is unable to keep hold of a carer for his mother. Comedy, staring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, turning their attention to shows including Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, Hostile Planet, Blind Date, Game of Thrones and the News. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Those taking part this time include Melina, a 23-year-old make-up artist who has struggled to find a man who is willing to accept that dating her also means dating her whole family. Vincent is a 26-year-old microbiologist who wants to meet a ginger-haired man who can match his intellectual conversation. So when redhead and fellow microbiologist Ben steps into the restaurant, it looks like a match made in science heaven

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back groom Courtney plans to throw a wedding for his controlling bride-to-be Lauren at the caravan park she goes to every year

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, Phil and Kate get the contest started with a menu inspired by their most romantic meals. Day two sees loved-up bus drivers Lee and Dawn cooking up favourite dishes from their wedding day, before plant biologist Katie and micro-brewer Ed try to impress with a Spanish-inspired menu

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a modelling agency representative approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. Meanwhile, Adam tries to get Murray to build bridges with his father

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray orders the cluttered garage be cleared out, although he insists on keeping one trunk that he is particularly sentimental about. Adam and Barry tease Erica mercilessly after discovering her old collection of New Kids on the Block memorabilia

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Couples from the West Midlands compete for the cash prize of £1,000. First to host are Sam and Karl, with a 1980s-inspired menu. Then, Ange and Dave cook up recipes using only the finest ingredients - according to them. Finally, it's Cleo and Nick's chance to impress with their American-inspired dishes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Bobby plans a nautical-themed wedding day, but his fiancee Jas dreams of an intimate local wedding

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel persuades her father Russell to give Joe's mother Gloria advice about drawing up a will, but is alarmed when the pair start to get along a little too well. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to work out whether they should be 'friends with benefits'. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy set to work on an uncrackable case, Holt adjusts to a new beat and Hitchcock looks for the love of his life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howard's past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: A friend of Mel decides she wants to have a baby, and believes Joe is the most suitable person to father her child. Meanwhile, Lennox and Haskell disagree over what to do with a rare book when they discover its value. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel calls on Joe for a favour when she pretends to her date, Travis, that she is an excellent cook, and is asked to put her money where her mouth is. Meanwhile, Lennox is shocked when she finds out that one of her friends has a crush on Ryder. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly discovers Adam is failing in Spanish class, and immediately blames his teacher. However, when she arranges for him to receive extra tuition, her plan backfires

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the 1984 presidential election approaches, Erica discovers that Beverly always just votes for the same candidate as Murray, and she sets out to educate her mother. Barry wants to appear on a sporty game show to prove his athletic prowess to his friends

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Holt asks Amy to take charge of a community outreach programme for at-risk youths, and Boyle helps Jeffords with a tough personal assignment. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr and Georgie go camping with Meemaw's new boyfriend Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend Dr Sturgis tags along. Sheldon and Missy invent a new game

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Georgie and Sheldon go mining for platinum in roadside gravel. Mary is concerned when Missy misuses religion to help improve her baseball playing

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to participate in a series of short lectures at the university, but is worried the students dislike him. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Imran Adams and Ross Adams look back at a classic storyline from 2011. Silas and Lynsey go head to head in the woods in a violent confrontation

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Strong connections begin to form between some of the newlyweds. Dean and Davina are excited to have met up - will they stay with their spouses or leave the experiment?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Riley's metabolism becomes dangerously accelerated, making him stronger and faster but putting his life in jeopardy. programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy becomes convinced her mother's illness is supernatural in origin, and casts a spell to learn the truth, but instead discovers that Dawn is somehow not real. Setting out in search of answers, she encounters an unstoppable new enemy whose strength far outmatches hers and is searching for the mysterious Key. Meanwhile, Giles' magic shop opens for business, leading Anya to discover her true calling

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Derbyshire meeting Sean and Jill who are building a traditional stone-clad home with a contemporary twist on the edge of the Derbyshire Dales

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodd's dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancy's complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the week's first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean B&B near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the host's chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's mating season for Chester Zoo's onagers and after two years living alone, male Holmes is released into the female paddock, where he chases down every female in sight. Galapagos tortoise Charlie is losing weight and keepers believe that it's down to bullying from her older sister, so they decide to step in with an innovative system to try and alleviate the problem

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team's first patient is a West Highland terrier puppy that has a problem with its paws. Two new bionic feet later, and the poorly dog has a new lease of life. A young husky collie is also brought in after being hit by a car, only for the hip replacement operation to run into trouble, and a lazy dachshund requires double surgery and lots of physiotherapy

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some vintage tiles, while Abbie has furniture to paint, problems with the swimming pool, out-of-date fire extinguishers and a big wedding party on its way

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Product designer Rebecca Sturrock has returned to her family home in Cornwall with her partner Gregory Kewish and a highly ambitious plan. Together they hope to transform a small, damp bungalow into a cutting-edge home to share with their twin three-year-old daughters - all for just £80,000. The design is radical - to reinforce the walls of the old property and add a new living space on top to take advantage of the views. This extra floor will be made entirely of thick wooden panels engineered in Germany and normally assembled by a crew of specialist installers. However, budget constraints mean the couple are determined to do it all themselves

programme.title: Ghosts of the Deep: Ancient Shipwrecks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following scientists on a quest to find out how the Black Sea changed from a freshwater lake to a sea at the end of the last Ice Age

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is having his third seizure of the day. He's in a semi-conscious state and needs to get to hospital urgently, but the two paramedics in attendance need back-up

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A tennis player is put into an induced coma after suffering a heart attack on the court, a fell runner is seriously injured by cows, and a man is crushed under a collapsed wall

programme.title: Building the Dream

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick gets to work on more animals in need of his help. A Great Dane requires high-risk surgery after being diagnosed with a cancerous tumour in its leg, and a Chihuahua has shattered the bones in its paw falling down the stairs while chasing a cat. programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Couple Mariam and Johnno arrive at their new chateau and discover they have no running water, and Julia has a decision to make when she re-visits a chateaux she fell in love with

programme.title: Grand Designs

Peter is a keen hobbyist who wants the house to feature a workshop where he can build a plane, and he's planning to spend twice the £200,000 budget Chard has in mind. programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners gather to find out who has won the competition. Diane and Max Seivewright, the hosts at Ombersley B&B, feel betrayed by Ann and Bill Clay's feedback and want to know why they have been so harshly criticised, while Galia Grainger asks why Slimmeria's rules and regulations have provoked so much hostility

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Mary is 50 and has had 19 children, and the keepers worry that another pregnancy could be risky, so they introduce younger female Kiara to the group in the hope that Mary's long-term partner Popoyan will develop a relationship with her instead. The staff also hope to breed dominant female giant otter Icana with new arrival Diego and plan to bring two feuding sloths closer together, while setting up a speed-dating event for three-legged chameleon Tripod

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team fight to save the leg of a much-loved golden retriever, and a French bulldog with twisted elbows needs a doggy wheelchair and some challenging surgery. At Noel's Oncology & Soft Tissue Hospital in Guildford, a spaniel cross has a tumour removed by specialist Professor Nick Bacon

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Emma and Paul desperately need to fill their lake with fresh water ready for the artists' retreat they are hosting. Emma steps in to model Victorian outfits for the artists, while Paul struggles on kitchen duty. Angel gives Abbie and Karen tips on how to save money for their wedding business, and she shows them how to create a stunning bar

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architect Patrick Bradley has come up with an unusual £100,000 house design built out of four 45ft shipping containers, welded together to form a giant cross and cantilevered over the top of a stream on the family farm in Co Derry. His mother is hoping the new home will help her son find a girlfriend, but the small budget and tight schedule soon pose problems. Kevin McCloud follows his progress

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to transform a goods wagon into a summerhouse and gin bar, and visits a narrowboat conversion in Buckinghamshire. George's Spanish tour reaches Madrid, where he meets a man who has spent the past 50 years building a cathedral by hand. Plus, work continues on the expandable caravan pod

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Kevin, 57, arrives at King's College Hospital in London with breathing difficulties, having fallen off a ladder onto a metal bar, while 11-year-old Archie has cut his lip in an accident at school and is worried about stitches. Elsewhere, a drink-related fall has left 53-year-old John with a head injury, and barman Ross, 31, needs treatment for a fractured eye socket following an alcohol-fuelled night out

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with David Mitchell and Cariad Lloyd taking on Jon Richardson and Russell Howard. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The Craggy Island clerics face the prospect of an untimely death during the return flight from a visit to a holy shrine. Jack quickly commandeers the only parachute and bails out, taking the drinks trolley with him - leaving Ted and Dougal to their fate

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Tom and Georgina in Berkshire, who are planning to renovate a run-down bungalow

programme.desc: The car customiser with countless star clients gets the chance to wrap an American vehicle when the owners of a Camaro give Yianni free reign on their motor

programme.title: Yianni: Supercar Customiser
programme.desc: The owner of Billericay Town FC asks Yianni to cover his beloved Ferrari F12 in the team's colours

programme.title: American Pickers: Best Of
programme.desc: The guys take a trip down memory lane when they look back at their grooviest picks from the disco decade.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The Alvarados take a gamble and Tarrell 'T-Money' Wright lands an interesting item. Plus, Brandon Bernier hopes to make an impact on the bidding for several storage units

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori strike it rich, and 'T-Money' takes risks while bidding

programme.title: American Pickers: Best Of
programme.desc: Mike and Frank look back on their trickiest excavations ever, including relics buried underground and awesome finds trapped under mountains of junk

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank bid on the chassis of a famous car, and invest in a restoration project

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers are stunned when they discover more than $2million of cocaine mixed in with gallons of household paint and bottles of beer

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A devastated cliff-top ruin, an extraordinarily tall tower, a concrete structure stranded at sea and a heavy metal monster in a field all feature

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns to offer more offbeat advice on mini-breaks, with this edition seeing him spending two days in the Russian city of St Petersburg in the company of comedian Rob Beckett. Together they embark on an itinerary that includes an armoured tank, caviar, vodka, ice, culture and a herring in a fur coat, and also go to a retro communist-era apartment popular with the hipster crowd

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian, actress and writer Aisling Bea to spend two days in the Hungarian capital, where they take in as many of the city's sights as possible - including a statue of Columbo star Peter Falk. They also have a crash course in the Hungarian language, sample goulash and local herbal liquor unicum, play a game of chess at thermal baths and go for a ride on the Zugliget chairlift, high in the Buda hills

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef's final trip takes him to Morocco, where he samples the delights of couscous, tagines and mint tea in the country's bazaars, before travelling along the old silk route in south-eastern Turkey to taste kebabs, another of the Mediterranean's favourite foods

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters are challenged to drive from Switzerland to Blackpool on just one tank of fuel, and the winner gets to switch on the Blackpool illuminations. James May also power-tests the Pagani Zonda F Roadster, and the Stig sets a lap time in the Bugatti Veyron. Comedian Harry Enfield is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond celebrates the 40th anniversary of the Ferrari Daytona by taking one back to its spiritual home - the Italian Riviera - before trying to beat James May and a powerboat in a race from Portofino to St Tropez. Back in the UK, Jeremy Clarkson tests the BMW M3 saloon and compares it with the Lexus IS-F. Grand Designs presenter Kevin McCloud is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Funnyman Jimmy Carr, actor and comedian Griff Rhys Jones, Hairy Biker Dave Myers and news presenter Susanna Reid join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: A compilation of extra material from the comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon. Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by guests including Mel Giedroyc, Jason Manford, Sarah Millican, Stephen Mangan, Dermot O'Leary, Charles Dance, Warwick Davis, David Harewood, Bob Mortimer, David O'Doherty and Joanna Scanlan to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Comedian Shappi Khorsandi, journalist and newsreader Michael Buerk, actress Amanda Abbington and comedian Elis James take part in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade heads to the Canary Islands for a packed mini-break with actress and writer Lena Dunham, the star and creator of American comedy drama Girls. In the north of the island, Richard and Lena visit a guachinche pop-up restaurant, where they have goat stew before exploring the barren lunar-like landscape around the volcanic Mount Teide and spend the evening stargazing. There is also a sculpture tour, including works by Henry Moore and Joan Miro, as well as layered coffee, a spot of golf and a search for whales

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Rhod Gilbert spend 48 hours in Florida's largest city, for a densely packed mini-break including art, art deco slobbing, alligators, yoga, speedboats and dominoes. They also squeeze in an airboat tour of the Florida Everglades and a trip to Little Havana

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Jo Brand, Clive Anderson and Jimmy Carr join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'new' in this extended episode. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: This Country
programme.desc: A one-off special investigating the fallout from the criminal activity of Kerry Mucklowe, who became embroiled in a criminal enterprise with her devious father Martin. As the police's net tightened around the Mucklowes, Kerry was left with a direct choice - save her father or save herself. Eight months on, the crew returns to the Cotswolds to investigate what has happened to both the family and the village community as a whole

programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to a series of celebrity guests, ultimately deciding who wins. This time, Mark Watson tries to open an unlocked briefcase

At home, he cooks a memorable dish of steak frites with Bordelaise sauce

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Reluctant tourist Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Matt Lucas for a frenetic 48 hours in the Italian capital. Their first challenge is finding suitable headgear to protect from the scorching Italian sun. They then take a guided tour in vintage Fiat 500 cars, and after wending their way past the Circus Maximus finish atop Gianicolo Hill in time for the cannon being fired - a daily ritual since the 1850s. Next they head to the border of the Vatican, before experiencing the very best of modern Italian cuisine. Day two sees visits to the Trevi Fountain and the Colosseum, perhaps Rome's most incredible antiquity

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Sara Pascoe for a two-day test of the mini break merits of Valencia, Spain's third largest city. After dropping their bags at the Hotel Caro, they set off along the path of the Turia river. Richard also enrols them at paella school to make authentic and vegan versions of the dish. The next day begins with a visit to Valencia's iconic City of Arts and Sciences, home to an Imax cinema, planetarium, opera house and aquarium, though Richard and Sara forgo these attractions to try zorbing instead

Rick also resumes his search for the perfect cod

programme.desc: Comedian Shappi Khorsandi, journalist and newsreader Michael Buerk, actress Amanda Abbington and comedian Elis James take part in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Joe Lycett head to the mini break mecca of Amsterdam. Their two-day hurtle through the city's attractions takes in culture, canals, cuisine, and other things not necessarily beginning with C. As part of their whistle-stop tour, the duo doss down in one of the city's hippest hotels, take a battery-powered boat tour, do some drawing, and peer into the world of the water bear. The brave travellers also sample some Dutch gin known as jenever, and visit the city's street organ museum

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and actress Sally Phillips head to the Swedish capital for a fulsome two days of fun. Despite having no head for heights, the duo fearlessly sample the city's only rooftop tour, before wrestling with the concept of fika - coffee and cake. The pair also a visit to the museum established in homage to 1970s pop group Abba and attend an interactive late-night art show involving their phones. After all this, there's still time to sample some meatballs, ride on a pedalo and experience the world's first ice bar

programme.title: Red Dwarf: The First Three Million Years
programme.desc: A look at the real and invented science that has been such a feature of Red Dwarf. Plus, the main cast talk about just how special Red Dwarf has been to them

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Rimmer gets hold of a Quantum skipper and skips his way across the multi-verse looking for a dimension where he is not such a giant loser. Sci-fi comedy, starring Craig Charles, Danny John-Jules, Chris Barrie and Robert Llewellyn

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: A ship from the 23rd century is washed up from the past and the Dwarfers run into a crew where criticism is illegal. programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: Exploring the high cost of surviving the sinking, including the tragic story of Frederick Fleet, one of two lookouts, whose quick actions may have averted an even great disaster

programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: The mysterious story of Howard Irwin, whose suitcase was aboard the Titanic, despite the fact that he wasn't, and the story behind the schoolbooks of Edgar Samuel Andrew and the chilling statement he wrote in a letter to his friend

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates a secret department of the Bulgarian government charged with carrying out assassinations in nine other countries during the Cold War

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Account of Operation Barbarossa, Germany's plan to invade the Soviet Union in 1941, revealing the massive human and financial cost endured by the Soviet people, who fought a bloody and lonely war with little support from the Allies. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Walmer Castle in Kent, where the team values a jacket worn by President Kennedy that could be one of the most valuable items ever featured on the series. Other items brought in include an art deco mask that terrifies its owner's children, an enamel advertising sign, and a letter from Lord Nelson that has an unexpected connection to the owner's dead husband

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A highway built in the Brazilian jungle as an escape route in the event of an emergency at a nuclear power station, a Soviet fortress and Ellis Island hospital

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets off on a journey from Oxford, through the Malvern Hills toward south Wales. He gets a special view of the city of Oxford, and discovers a unique and colourful crop in the Cotswolds

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo visits the Worcestershire village of Hartlebury, which was once home to a bishop who captured Queen Victoria's attention, on the second leg of his journey from Oxford to the south Wales coast. He also investigates the secrets of Worcestershire sauce and learns why the Malvern Hills were popular with 19th-century health enthusiasts

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second visit in this series to Plas Newydd on the Isle of Anglesey. The team examine rarities including a cabinet with a secret function, a magazine rack made by celebrated designer Piero Fornasetti, a collection of historical items related to deafness, a Chinese silver punchbowl and a photo that has a connection to the Apollo 11 mission

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: The wilderness lines that have pushed the frontiers of human endeavour into previously unknown territories, solving a set of complex problems along the way

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The programme looks at a mysterious group of rusting ships stranded in an arid desert, and a monstrous defensive line on the snow-covered peaks of the Italian Alps

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: The use of propaganda in Hitler's Nazi regime. The first episode examines the Fuehrer's fascination with propaganda, which began in the trenches of the First World War

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo discovers micro-mines hidden in the Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, and finds out why the Victorians were so enamoured with Tintern Abbey in the Wye Valley along the border between England and Wales. Plus, he investigates the railway engineering behind the Newport Transporter Bridge

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo discovers the importance of Cardiff's Victorian coal heritage to the city's development. He also finds out why Barry Island has been attached to the mainland since the 19th century, and takes a steam ride through the Brecon Beacons National Park

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Antiques dealer and expert restorer Gary Wallis and his team of highly skilled craftspeople turn the tired and unloved items into objects that will turn a large profit. In the opening episode, they restore a Grenadier guard's drum, create a garden feature from a helicopter tripod and re-purpose a vintage car grille into a gleaming design classic

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Crafty con Fletcher helps new inmate Godber settle in by giving him a few lessons on coping with prison life. First episode of the classic comedy, originally broadcast in 1974, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Betting fever sweeps Slade Prison, but the stakes rise too high for some of the inmates, stretching honour among thieves to the limit. Vintage comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher helps cellmate Godber make it through the night, calling on his unpredictable and limitless imagination to while away the hours. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright expands his empire by opening a mobile shop in a bid to impress Nurse Gladys Emmanuel, but the enterprise is cut short by a close encounter with some perishables

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright loses his trousers on the way to the wedding of Nurse Gladys Emmanuel's niece, and ends up having to borrow a pair of her trousers to wear at the event

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the Cairngorms National Park to discover how Queen Victoria and Prince Albert helped shape Scottish traditions and imagery, such as tartan, bagpipes and caber-tossing. Starting in Pitlochry, he traverses the Killiecrankie Pass, where the Jacobites won the Battle of Killiecrankie, and ends his trek at Balmoral and the fantasy castle Albert built as his and Victoria's Highland escape

programme.title: Titanic: Stories from the Deep
programme.desc: Thanks to the use of cutting-edge technology, a unique collection of artefacts salvaged from the underwater resting site of the famous wreck suggest new stories of love, deception, fate and heroics. This first episode touches on Fifth Officer Harold Lowe. After Titanic sank, his lifeboat was one of the few to go back and pick up survivors. One of the people he saved, Renee Harris, gifted him a set of gold-plated nautical equipment as a symbol of her gratitude. Plus, a well-preserved alligator bag recovered from the wreck site containing fascinating clues about the life of its owner

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: The historian reveals a story of invasion in Britain spanning millennia, beginning with him felling a tree with a flint axe in Kent, and riding an Iron Age chariot. Sam Willis also searches for clues of invasion at Silbury Hill, and tracks down evidence of the Beaker people, who brought ceramics, metalwork and beakers to Britain

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: As the 800th anniversary of the signing of Magna Carta in June 1215 approaches, Tony Robinson sets out to discover the real King John. His walk across the medieval monarch's stamping grounds of Sherwood Forest and the Peak District reveals a hapless man stumbling from crisis to crisis who, in the end, had no choice but to sign away some of his power. In the midst of what are now cultivated fields, Tony finds the scant remains of Laxton Castle, once the control centre where strict 'forest law' was administered and where taxes and fines flooded into the royal coffers. Later, in Sherwood, he explores how the myth of Robin Hood has helped to skew the public's image of King John

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Majid Ravandi hosts the final dinner party in south London, but fails to impress with a hot prawn starter and a dry main course. As the meal progresses, a bickering Joe and Karen threaten to spoil the cook's friendly demeanour, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas is house hunting Torremolinos on the Costa Del Sol with Chris and Jacqueline from Lancashire, finding five properties within their £150,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Having visited the area around Cabo Roig in Spain several times, singer Cliff and beautician Angela feel it's the perfect place to enjoy extended breaks in their own holiday home. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
